question: Is Autumn a good time to collect bear pelts in US?
context: Autumn runs from September to the end of December in the US.
Bears go into hibernation from September through April and are scarcely seen.
response:
<reasoning>
Autumn in the US runs from September to the end of December.
Bears go into hibernation from September through April.
Bears are scarcely seen during hibernation.
Collecting bear pelts requires encountering bears.
Bears are scarcely seen during the autumn months.
Autumn is not a good time to collect bear pelts in the US.
<answer> No
claims: Autumn in the US runs from September to the end of December
Bears go into hibernation from September through April
Bears are scarcely seen during hibernation
Collecting bear pelts requires encountering bears
Bears are scarcely seen during the autumn months
Autumn is not a good time to collect bear pelts in the US
